perturbation.original_text: Buyer shall not directly contact th e Listing owners or their landlords, employees, agents, representatives, suppliers or customers (collectively, the “Listing Party”) except through Broker. All correspondence, inquiries , offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the purchase or lease of any Listing presented by Broker will be conducted exclusively through Broker.
perturbation.changed_text: Buyer shall not directly contact th e Listing owners or their landlords, employees, agents, representatives, suppliers or customers (collectively, the “Listing Party”). All correspondence, inquiries , offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the purchase or lease of any Listing presented by Broker will be conducted exclusively through Broker.
perturbation.explanation: Removing the exception 'except through Broker' creates an in-text contradiction. It now completely prohibits any contact with the Listing Party, even through the Broker, which is the intended intermediary. This undermines the purpose of the agreement, which is to facilitate a potential transaction between the buyer and the Listing Party, which by nature would need interactions.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Buyer shall not directly contact th e Listing owners or their landlords, employees, agents, representatives, suppliers or customers (collectively, the “Listing Party”). All correspondence, inquiries , offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the purchase or lease of any Listing presented by Broker will be conducted exclusively through Broker.
perturbation.justification: The changed text removes the exception 'except through Broker' from the original text, which permitted contact with the Listing Party through the Broker. The contradicted text, which is the same as the original text, states that 'All correspondence, inquiries , offers to purchase and negotiations relating to the purchase or lease of any Listing presented by Broker will be conducted exclusively through Broker'. The change creates a contradiction because it now prohibits any contact with the Listing Party, even through the Broker, which is the intended intermediary according to the contradicted text. This undermines the purpose of the agreement, which is to facilitate a potential transaction.

perturbation.original_text: Buyer understands that if Buyer interferes with Broker’s contract with any Listing Party , Buyer will be personally liable to Broker for the payment of Broker’s commission. Buyer recognizes that under the terms of Broker’s listing agreement a commission shall be due if at any point in time a Listing , or any interest therein, is transferred from a Listing Party to a Buyer introduced by Corbett. Buyer agrees that s/he will not engage with any Listing Party at any time subsequent to being introduced by Corbett for the purpose of purchasing a Listing without Broker’s involvement.
perturbation.changed_text: Buyer understands that if Buyer interferes with Broker’s contract with any Listing Party , Buyer will be personally liable to Broker for the payment of Broker’s commission. Buyer recognizes that under the terms of Broker’s listing agreement a commission shall be due if at any point in time a Listing , or any interest therein, is transferred from a Listing Party to a Buyer introduced by Corbett.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the sentence 'Buyer agrees that s/he will not engage with any Listing Party at any time subsequent to being introduced by Corbett for the purpose of purchasing a Listing without Broker’s involvement,' the clause becomes contradictory. The initial sentences state liability for interfering with the broker's contract and recognizes a commission is due if the Listing Party transfers interests, however, with this removal, the 'without Broker's involvement' part is no longer enforced. This is because the agreement now creates an environment where the broker is not protected after the intro.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Buyer understands that if Buyer interferes with Broker’s contract with any Listing Party , Buyer will be personally liable to Broker for the payment of Broker’s commission. Buyer recognizes that under the terms of Broker’s listing agreement a commission shall be due if at any point in time a Listing , or any interest therein, is transferred from a Listing Party to a Buyer introduced by Corbett.
perturbation.justification: The change removes the explicit prohibition against the buyer engaging with the listing party without the broker's involvement after being introduced by the broker. The original text provided a clear boundary that the buyer could not circumvent the broker after an introduction. The changed text removes this boundary, implicitly allowing the buyer to engage with the listing party without the broker's involvement, thereby contradicting the intent of the original text and contradicted text, which ensures the broker's commission if a transfer occurs after the broker's introduction. The contradiction arises because the liability for interfering with the contract is weakened by removing the explicit prohibition.

perturbation.original_text: Entire Agreement. The parties hereto agree that the Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties relating to the subject matter of the Agreement and that there are no other agreements, understandings, representations o r warranties mad e or given, except as expressly set forth herein. All prior agreements, understandings, letters and/or communications relating to the subject matter of the Agreement shall be null and void and shall be superseded by the Agreement, except as expressly set forth herein.
perturbation.changed_text: Entire Agreement. The parties hereto agree that the Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties relating to the subject matter of the Agreement and that there are no other agreements, understandings, representations o r warranties mad e or given.
perturbation.explanation: By removing 'except as expressly set forth herein. All prior agreements, understandings, letters and/or communications relating to the subject matter of the Agreement shall be null and void and shall be superseded by the Agreement, except as expressly set forth herein.', the clause creates an internal contradiction. By removing that limitation, now ALL agreements outside the current one are valid, including prior statements and letters of intent. This is especially impactful because it can now contradict other provisions, where all other forms of communications were considered invalid.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Entire Agreement. The parties hereto agree that the Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties relating to the subject matter of the Agreement and that there are no other agreements, understandings, representations o r warranties mad e or given.
perturbation.justification: The original text specified that only agreements expressly set forth within the current agreement are valid. By removing 'except as expressly set forth herein. All prior agreements, understandings, letters and/or communications relating to the subject matter of the Agreement shall be null and void and shall be superseded by the Agreement, except as expressly set forth herein.' from the 'Entire Agreement' clause, the changed text now implies that all prior agreements are potentially valid, directly contradicting the contradicted text, which also states that the current agreement constitutes the entire agreement. The Perturbation Explanation also confirms that it can contradict other provisions, where all other forms of communications were considered invalid.
